name: Concrete Leveling Systems Inc
business: The company fabricates and markets a concrete leveling service unit that secures to the back of a truck and consists of a mixing device to mix lime with water and a pumping device to pump the mixture under pressure into pre-drilled holes to raise flat concrete surfaces. The company also has a potential gaming and hospitality division contingent on the closing of the Jericho acquisition.

exposures.sentence: The concrete leveling division of the business will fabricate and market a concrete leveling service unit utilized in the concrete leveling industry.

The gaming and hospitality division of the business will focus on casino gaming, hospitality, entertainment and leisure time industries, and will pursue opportunities in the tribal and commercial casino gaming industries, both in California and Nevada.

catalysts.event: Regulatory review and financing completion for over $300 million casino and hotel resort project
catalysts.sentence: The contemplated over $300 million project, is in the process of regulatory review, finalization of closing documents, and completion of financing.
